top_signals.title: Oil traders warn market is close to running on empty as Hormuz shuts again

top_signals.summary: Chilean miner maintained annual production guidance despite weaker second-quarter output and rising costs.

top_signals.title: Nearly 300 GitHub repos pose as legit software to push malware
top_signals.summary: A threat actor has published hundreds of fake GitHub repositories impersonating legitimate software and security projects to distribute infostealer malware. [...]

top_signals.title: South Korea to bring crypto under new state asset management law
top_signals.summary: The Ministry of Finance and Economy said it will establish the 'National Asset Basic Act' to update the government's asset management system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
